pageDescription: CPE Concordia offers full-time, high-quality childcare for preschool children in downtown Montreal.
heroTitle: CPE Concordia, where childhood curiosity becomes confidence.
heroText: Workplace centre associated with Concordia University, offering full-time, high-quality childcare for children of age 18 months to 59 months.
heroNote: Priority is given to Concordia University students, staff, and faculty families.
heroImageAlt: Children in a classroom activity at CPE Concordia
storyText1: Founded in 1981, CPE Concordia is located in the Grey Nuns Residence building and serves up to 80 children.
storyText2: CPE Concordia is a non-profit organization governed by a Board of Directors composed primarily of parents. The centre relies on the active involvement of parents and guardians to build a positive relationship between parents, guardians, children and staff.
missionText1: To provide an environment that ensures the child's health and safety.
missionText2: Our program provides opportunities for physical growth, intellectual, social and emotional development emphasizing self-help skills, cooperation, and the building of self-esteem.
missionText3: We also create a loving, caring climate that promotes respect for the diversity of culture, race, religion, and ability of others and for the environment.
missionText4: Our educational program acknowledges and encourages learning through play experiences and peer interaction.
missionText6: The centre relies on active involvement of parents/guardians through frequent communication with staff and parent participation.
missionText7: Staff members are qualified professionals in the field of Early Childhood Education. Continuous professional development for our staff is valued and supported by the centre to ensure quality childcare for the children and their families.
bilingualText1: Notre methode: l'apprentissage par le jeu. Nous valorisons une communication constante avec les parents et un environnement chaleureux pour chaque enfant.
bilingualText2: We embrace a welcoming and inclusive environment for families from all backgrounds.
parentsIntroLead: Our waiting list is managed by a new
parentsIntroTail: . You can register on their website or by telephone at 1 866 747-6626. When you register your child for the first time, it is important to mention that you are a Concordia University staff, or student member, or have a child already attending our CPE, as the case may be.
admissionsTextLead: Our waiting list is managed by an external organization,
admissionsTextTail: . Please contact them directly for more detailed information.
curriculumText: CPE Concordia follows an educational program in compliance with the Quebec Ministere de la Famille requirements.
faqText: Please consult our list of most frequently asked questions to help parents get answers and more information regarding our CPE.
donateText: If you would like to support the daycare, a donation option will be available soon. Thank you for helping us continue to provide a warm and enriching environment for children.
contactText1: We are located on Concordia University's Sir George Williams campus.
contactNoteLead: For admissions questions, please contact the new
hoursText1: Operating hours are Monday to Friday, 7 a.m. to 6 p.m.
hoursText2: Open year-round, the Centre observes similar (13 days) holidays as Concordia University.
messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
footerPrivacy: This site stores your language preference in your browser. No personal data is collected or transmitted.
